name: Thessaloniki Water Supply & Sewerage Co S.A.
summary: Thessaloniki Water Supply & Sewerage Co S.A., doing business as EYATH S.A., provides water supply and sewerage services in Greece. The company engages in the design, construction, installation, operation, utilization, management, maintenance, extension, and renewal of water supply and sewerage systems, as well as undertakes waste water treatment services. It also offers telecommunication services; and generates and sells electricity. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Thessaloniki, Greece.
